    COMPASSIONATE FAMILY DENTAL CARE IN SOUTH EDMONTON FOR ALL AGES

    ​Omnia Dental is renowned as a reliable family dental clinic in South Edmonton, providing a friendly and inviting atmosphere for patients of all ages for comprehensive dental care. Our proficient team is dedicated to delivering compassionate, customized care tailored to each individual's needs. Regardless matter whether it is a child's inaugural visit, routine dental cleanings & treatments, or a more complex procedure, we ensure that every patient experiences comfort and attentive care in our contemporary dental facility.
    Omnia Dental offers comprehensive care, from checkups and cleanings to advanced Solea Laser treatments, clear aligners, or dental implants - all with your comfort in mind.

    ADVANCED SOLEA LASER DENTISTRY IN SOUTH EDMONTON

    ​As a premier provider of Solea Laser Treatment in Edmonton, we deliver state-of-the-art, drill-free dentistry that enhances speed, reduces noise, and minimizes the discomfort of procedures. Our proficient Solea Laser Dentist near South Edmonton employs this cutting-edge technology to address cavities and execute soft tissue operations with accuracy—frequently without the necessity for anesthetic.

    Discover the advancements of laser dentistry at Omnia Dental. We are conveniently located at 5005 Mullen Rd NW, Edmonton, AB T6R 0S9, Omnia Dental is proud to serve South Edmonton families with trusted care and innovative dental solutions.

    More About Solea®

    GENERAL AND PREVENTATIVE CARE

    Our comprehensive general & preventative dentistry services include exams, cleanings, fillings, and oral health education to help you maintain a healthy, lasting smile. Whether you’re visiting for a routine checkup or more complex care, our experienced & affordable family dentists are here to provide compassionate, professional service every step of the way. We focus on preventive care and early detection to support long-term oral health and overall well-being.

    Based in South Edmonton, we proudly serve all of Edmonton AB. Schedule your appointment with Omnia Dental today and experience gentle, personalized care. Your healthiest smile starts here!

    Book Online

    DENTAL FINANCING NOW AVAILABLE

    At Omnia Dental Clinic, financial concerns should never stand in the way of your care. Through our partnership with Dentalcard by iFinance, eligible patients can access flexible monthly payment options designed to make treatment more manageable.

    The process is simple:

    1. Apply online using our secure application link

    2. Get an answer within minutes

    3. Payment is sent directly to Omnia Dental Clinic

    ​

    No complicated paperwork. No waiting weeks for approval.

    Apply Now

    FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

    Omnia Dental provides comprehensive dental care in South Edmonton, including general dentistry, cosmetic procedures, restorative treatments, preventative care, and advanced laser dentistry with Solea Laser technology. We proudly serve individuals and families in South Edmonton and nearby communities, focusing on modern, patient-centered dental care.

    Solea Laser is a state-of-the-art dental technology that replaces the need for drills and needles in many procedures. It uses a highly precise laser beam to perform dental treatments with minimal discomfort, no vibration, and virtually no noise. This innovation offers faster healing, greater precision, and a more relaxed experience for patients compared to traditional methods.

    Absolutely. At Omnia Dental, we use the Solea Laser to perform most cavity fillings and soft tissue procedures without the need for drills or needles. This makes your visit more comfortable, less stressful, and often faster, particularly for patients who experience dental anxiety.

    Omnia Dental is proud to be a trusted choice for family dentistry in South Edmonton. We prioritize personalized care, patient comfort, and clear communication. Our experienced team and advanced technology make us a leading option for families seeking compassionate and high-quality dental services.

    Booking an appointment is easy. You can schedule online through our website at omnia-dental.ca, or call us directly at (825) 401-9898. Walk-ins are welcome, but we recommend booking ahead for timely service.

    Your first visit includes a comprehensive dental exam, a discussion about your oral health goals, and a customized treatment plan. We take the time to answer your questions and ensure you feel comfortable and informed about your care.

    Most routine procedures—such as dental cleanings or laser-assisted fillings with Solea—can be completed in a single visit. These treatments are often faster than traditional methods. More complex cases may require multiple appointments, which we’ll clearly explain in your treatment plan.

    We use the latest in dental technology to enhance accuracy and comfort. This includes the Solea Laser for needle-free and drill-free treatments, digital x-rays for minimal radiation exposure, and modern sterilization protocols to ensure the highest standards of safety and hygiene.

    Yes, laser dentistry with Solea is safe and effective for patients of all ages. Whether it’s a child’s first dental visit or a senior’s restorative treatment, Solea provides a gentle and efficient solution with reduced discomfort and quicker healing times.

    From the moment a patient walks in, every touchpoint—scheduling, welcoming, treatment, and follow-up is smooth and personalized. It’s dental care that anticipates needs before they’re spoken. Excellence is not just a goal at Omnia Dental, it’s your everyday standard, effortlessly integrated into everything we do.
